title: More Menu
heading: Contact Us
text:
# Contact Us

This website is designed & developed by National Informatics Center and maintained by District Administration, West Tripura , Government of Tripura.
In case you have any query regarding this website, you may write to the Web Information Manager at dmwest-tr@nic[dot]in
Any feedback, related to content, design, or technology may be submitted at Feedback section.
You can also contact us at the following address:
Senior Deputy Magistrate and DDO
Office of the DM and Collector, West Tripura District
Agartala, Pin 799001
